schema: verdi.decisionconflict/v1
covers: 8fe7657229168de7c7fe8d9f45007f0d0a549249
findings:
  - { id: judged-cf-1, kind: judged, text: "Story dc-4 adds a third disclosed-and-kept case — a worktree whose lockfile is held by a live process is skipped ('kept: in use by pid N') even when its gc signal (merged/deleted) has fired — but the frozen parent feature dc-4 enumerates exactly one kept exception (uncommitted changes) and otherwise declares merged-or-deleted worktrees reclaimable. The story itself concedes the case is 'not literally named by the frozen feature spec' yet declares no supersedes/exempts edge against the parent decision, so this widening of the kept-set is an undeclared deviation from feature dc-4's ratified reclamation contract. (confidence 0.55)", target_ref: spec/workbench-directory }

The story itself concedes the case is 'not literally named by the frozen feature spec' yet declares no supersedes/exempts edge against the parent decision, so this widening of the kept-set is an undeclared deviation from feature dc-4's ratified reclamation contract.\",\"confidence\":0.55,\"target\":\"spec/workbench-directory\"}]}" }

# Decision-conflict report

## Computed (declared-edge completeness)

(none)

## Judged (undeclared-conflict sweep)

- **judged-cf-1** [UNDISPOSITIONED]: Story dc-4 adds a third disclosed-and-kept case — a worktree whose lockfile is held by a live process is skipped ('kept: in use by pid N') even when its gc signal (merged/deleted) has fired — but the frozen parent feature dc-4 enumerates exactly one kept exception (uncommitted changes) and otherwise declares merged-or-deleted worktrees reclaimable. The story itself concedes the case is 'not literally named by the frozen feature spec' yet declares no supersedes/exempts edge against the parent decision, so this widening of the kept-set is an undeclared deviation from feature dc-4's ratified reclamation contract. (confidence 0.55)
